texto: At that moment, there was nothing in the entire damn world I wanted more than her. And it felt like there was nothing else I would ever wanted. It was insane and I'm taking it for the warning it was.I need to stay away from her.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Elizabeth O'Roark: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “At that moment, there was nothing in the entire damn world I wanted more than her. And it felt li…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, desire, romance pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de romance e want.
